channel.title: Web Search on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Web Search on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Aliyun Bailian (7): Built-in Web Search and Code Interpreter
item.description: The previous article built a coding agent by hand: define tools, loop, dispatch, repeat. That’s the right pattern when the tools are yours (your filesystem, your test runner). But for two extremely common tools — searching the web and running a snippet of code — Model Studio now runs them server-side. You enable a flag, the platform does the search-or-execute round trip inside one API call, and you get the final answer back. This article is the practical guide to those built-in tools.
